allow: PowerShell($v = \(Get-Command vercel -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($v\) { Write-Output "vercel: $\($v.Source\)"; vercel whoami } else { Write-Output "vercel CLI not found" })

PowerShell($url = "https://patrimonio-o50flb6il-rafaelmoreira18s-projects.vercel.app"; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { $line = \(vercel ls 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "o50flb6il" -Context 0,1\); $status = \(vercel inspect $url 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "status\\s+" | Select-Object -First 1\); Write-Output "[$i] $status"; if \("$status" -match "Ready|Error|Canceled"\) { break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 15 })

PowerShell($base = "https://patrimonio-o50flb6il-rafaelmoreira18s-projects.vercel.app"; foreach \($p in @\("/Logo_mediall.png","/sw.js","/login"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base$p" -Method Head -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "$p -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; Write-Output "$p -> $code" } })

PowerShell($base = "https://linensistem.vercel.app"; foreach \($p in @\("/Logo_mediall.png","/sw.js","/login"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base$p" -Method Head -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; $ct = $r.Headers["Content-Type"]; Write-Output "$p -> $\($r.StatusCode\) [$ct]" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; Write-Output "$p -> $code" } })
